ops.text: Fix Alarm Math: Simplify UI picker to 1-12 and fix Calendar field mapping in Scheduler

ops.find_block:
Text(
                        String.format("%02d:%02d", now.get(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY), now.get(Calendar.MINUTE)),
                        color = Color.White, fontSize = 80.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
                    )

alarms.forEach { alarm ->
            val target = Calendar.getInstance().apply {
                set(Calendar.HOUR, if(alarm.hour == 12) 0 else alarm.hour)
                set(Calendar.MINUTE, alarm.minute)
                set(Calendar.SECOND, 0)
                set(Calendar.AM_PM, if(alarm.isAm) Calendar.AM else Calendar.PM)
            }
ops.replace_with:
alarms.forEach { alarm ->
            val target = Calendar.getInstance().apply {
                set(Calendar.HOUR, alarm.hour % 12)
                set(Calendar.MINUTE, alarm.minute)
                set(Calendar.SECOND, 0)
                set(Calendar.AM_PM, if(alarm.isAm) Calendar.AM else Calendar.PM)
            }
